name: Coast2Coast Mortgage Lending | Jacksonville, Florida
description_short: Coast2Coast Mortgage is a Jacksonville-based lender offering conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, and specialized mortgage products including investment property and foreign national loans.
description_long:
Coast2Coast Mortgage operates a Jacksonville branch of a larger mortgage lending network with 15+ years of experience in the home financing sector. The company positions itself as a comprehensive mortgage partner serving diverse borrower profiles, from first-time homebuyers to commercial real estate investors. Their website emphasizes 97% customer satisfaction and rapid pre-approval processes.

The lender offers an extensive product suite including conventional mortgages (3% down, up to $832,750), government-backed loans (FHA with credit scores as low as 580, VA with no down payment, USDA rural loans), and specialized programs for self-employed borrowers, real estate investors, and foreign nationals. They also provide investment-focused financing including DSCR programs, pad split loans for room rentals, short-term rental loans for Airbnb/VRBO properties, and jumbo loans up to $5 million+ for luxury properties. Commercial loan options are listed for multi-unit and business properties.

The company differentiates through loan specialization—particularly strength in investor products (DSCR, pad split, short-term rental) and foreign national financing, which are less commonly advertised by mainstream lenders. Their digital application process with real-time status tracking and local market expertise are highlighted advantages. The 97% satisfaction metric and quick pre-approval claims suggest operational efficiency.

However, key limitations exist: no independent third-party review data is available to verify the satisfaction claim; specific interest rate comparisons are not provided; loan approval rates and actual processing timelines are undisclosed; and no information is provided about fees, closing costs, or whether rates are competitive relative to national benchmarks. The broad product range may indicate less specialization in any single area.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers specialized investor programs (DSCR, pad split loans, short-term rental financing) rarely marketed by mainstream lenders
Foreign national loan products for non-U.S. citizens without U.S. credit history
Self-employed mortgage program with bank statement and 1099 income documentation options
Full spectrum of government-backed loans (FHA, VA, USDA) with flexible credit requirements
Jumbo loan products up to $5 million+ for high-value and luxury properties
Digital application and tracking system allowing online submission and real-time status monitoring
Local Jacksonville market expertise combined with national lending network resources
cons: No published interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules for rate comparison shopping
97% customer satisfaction claim lacks third-party verification or independent reviews
Actual approval timelines and processing speeds not disclosed despite 'quick pre-approval' claims
Broad product range may indicate generalist approach rather than deep specialization in any single loan type
No information on closing costs, origination fees, or total cost of borrowing
best_for: Real estate investors seeking specialized DSCR, pad split, or short-term rental financing
Self-employed professionals and business owners with non-traditional income documentation
Foreign national buyers and international investors seeking U.S. real estate financing
Veterans and active military members looking for VA loan benefits
diagnosis: Coast2Coast Mortgage Jacksonville is best suited for borrowers with non-traditional financing needs—particularly real estate investors, self-employed individuals, and foreign nationals—who require specialized loan products not commonly available from mainstream lenders. The main caveat is the absence of published rates, fees, or third-party performance data, making it essential to obtain multiple competing quotes and verify their actual rates and closing costs before committing.
services: Conventional mortgage loans (3% down, fixed/ARM, 15/20/30-year terms)
FHA government-backed mortgages (3.5% down, credit scores 580+)
VA home loans for veterans and military families (no down payment required)
USDA rural and suburban zero-down-payment mortgages
Self-employed mortgage programs with bank statement and 1099 options
Investor Cash Flow DSCR Program (debt-service-coverage-ratio based qualification)
Pad split loans for room-rental investment strategies
Short-term rental loans for Airbnb and VRBO properties
Foreign national mortgages (no U.S. credit required)
Jumbo loans for luxury properties up to $5 million+
Commercial property loans for multi-unit and business buildings
Online application and real-time mortgage status tracking
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
